## deleteTaskDescriptor variable

Centralized descriptor for the `delete` command.

Drives the CLI subcommand `delete` and the MCP tool `task_delete`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
deleteTaskDescriptor: import("../registry/define.js").ResolvedCommandDescriptor<{
    taskId: string;
}, DeleteResult, z.ZodObject<{
    taskId: z.ZodString;
}, "strip", z.ZodTypeAny, {
    taskId: string;
}, {
    taskId: string;
}>>
```
